description: Address review issues: fix clipboard error handling, delete dead files, add missing GraphQL snippet, update stats and category counts.
steps: Fix clipboard error handling in LivePreviewSection.tsx to use async/await with try/catch matching CopyButton.tsx pattern
Delete dead component files: HeroIllustration.tsx, UseCasesSection.tsx, FeatureIllustrations.tsx
Add 1 GraphQL snippet to bring GraphQL to 3 total
Update StatsSection to show 120+ instead of 122+
Update CategoriesSection GraphQL count from 2 to 3
acceptance_criteria: LivePreviewSection clipboard handling uses async/await with try/catch
HeroIllustration.tsx, UseCasesSection.tsx, and FeatureIllustrations.tsx are deleted
findings: All review issues addressed. Redis already had 3 snippets (redis-cache-aside-pattern, redis-distributed-lock, redis-pub-sub-events) so no new Redis snippet was needed. Added 1 GraphQL subscription snippet bringing GraphQL to 3. Total snippet count is now 123. Build generates 251 static pages. Lint passes clean.
